history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle shot captures a dark-skinned man with an extremely muscular physique, shirtless, with his mouth wide open in a scream or shout. His eyes are closed, and his facial expression conveys intense emotion, possibly frustration or anger. His arms are spread slightly to the sides, emphasizing his broad chest and shoulders.

Overlaid on the lower half of the image are two lines of text in a bold, white sans-serif font with a black outline. The top line reads "TAK NAK" in all capital letters. The bottom line reads "membujuk mamah" in lowercase letters.

The background is dark and out of focus, suggesting an indoor setting with dim lighting. The lighting is dramatic, with strong shadows highlighting the contours of the man's musculature and casting his face in a somewhat harsh light, emphasizing the intensity of his expression. The overall color palette is dominated by dark tones, with the white text providing a stark contrast. The mood is intense, raw, and dramatic, evoking a sense of overwhelming emotion. The style is reminiscent of a meme or reaction image, with the text adding a layer of context or commentary to the visual.
